name: Sweet Sour Veggies
recipeIngredient: Vegetables of your choice. I used:
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the soy sauce, vinegar, and vegetable broth in a bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, mix together the corn starch and brown sugar until well combined.
3. Add the corn starch and brown sugar mixture to the liquid mixture from step 1.
4. Add the minced ginger to the mixture.
5. Heat additional vegetable broth in a large skillet or wok over medium heat.
6. Add the chopped vegetables (red onion, garlic, carrots, bell pepper, zucchini, mushrooms) to the skillet and sauté until just before they are cooked through, about 5-7 minutes.
7. Remove the skillet from the heat and add the liquid mixture from step 4 to the vegetables.
8. Return the skillet to the heat and continue to cook for an additional 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
9. Serve the sweet sour veggies over brown rice. Enjoy!
